title: session_id at ClearMessage::Payment level, not on each PaymentAction variant — correct layer
description:
session_id: Uuid is on ClearMessage::Payment, not duplicated into each PaymentAction variant. A contributor might suggest adding session_id to each variant so it is 'always available without pattern matching the outer enum.'

The current design is correct. session_id identifies the session, not the action. Putting it on the outer envelope (Payment) makes the relationship explicit: one session, multiple actions. Adding it to each variant would allow (in theory) a message where the outer session_id and an inner variant's session_id disagree, which would be a validation nightmare. The outer placement also correctly models the protocol: the relay wraps a Payment message, and session_id is metadata about the message, not about the action type.
close_reason: Fully implemented by nie-6sp, nie-c20, nie-c1v respectively
